pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 17 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project may compile against the default JDK version of the build environment, potentially producing bytecode incompatible with Java 17 or failing to enforce Java 17 language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to a newer snapshot version.
